hero.heading: Let's Talk About Your Elevator Requirements
hero.description: Whether you need a new installation, a maintenance visit, an urgent repair, or an AMC quote — our team in Ahmedabad is ready to help. Fill in the form and we will get back to you promptly.

form.heading: Send Us a Message
form.description: We typically respond within one business day.

messages.minLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.

messages.pattern: Please enter a valid 10-digit Indian mobile number.
Please enter a valid email address.

message.label: How Can We Help?
message.placeholder: Tell us about your elevator requirements — service type, building type, location, or any specific concerns.

messages.required: Please describe how we can help.

success.heading: Thank You for Reaching Out
success.message: We have received your message and will get back to you within one business day. For urgent requirements, please call us directly.

error.heading: Something Went Wrong
error.message: Your message could not be sent at this time. Please try again or contact us directly by phone.

quickContact.heading: Prefer to Reach Us Directly?
quickContact.description: Our team is available Monday to Sunday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM IST.

map.heading: Find Us in Ahmedabad
map.title: Revotek Elevators location at Vatva GIDC Ahmedabad

seo.metaTitle: Contact Revotek Elevators | Elevator Services in Ahmedabad
seo.metaDescription: Contact Revotek Elevators in Ahmedabad for elevator installation, maintenance, repair, AMC, and spare parts. Reach our team by phone, WhatsApp, or email.
